seoTitle: Harrisdale vs Harvey — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harrisdale and Harvey. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harrisdale and Harvey.
heading: Harrisdale vs Harvey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harrisdale, Western Australia and Harvey, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harrisdale and Harvey have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Harrisdale or Harvey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harrisdale has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Harvey scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harrisdale scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Harvey scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harrisdale or Harvey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harrisdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
